author: y4rr
content: [result] Investigation showed ferrotorch already uses ferray-ufunc SIMD kernels for add and mul (via fast_add/fast_mul with rayon parallelism + pool allocation). Added fast_sub and fast_div following the same pattern — vectorizable loops with rayon parallel chunking for tensors >= 32K elements, pool-allocated output buffers, f32/f64 specializations. LLVM auto-vectorizes the simple sub/div loops to SIMD. Wired into arithmetic dispatch (sub/div now use fast_sub/fast_div instead of scalar binary_map). 3271 tests pass.
